meta.note: Baseline run with synthetic API calls. Real Claude Code session measurement pending (M2 gate).

findings.why_zero_savings: All synthetic test messages < 50 words — content_router threshold not reached. System prompt (4612 tokens) passes through uncompressed.
gotchas: curl/urllib route through HTTPS_PROXY (Hiddify:12334) by default — must set NO_PROXY=127.0.0.1 for localhost calls
headroom-ai[proxy] deps not installed by default in venv — added via uv pip install
headroom perf counts message content tokens, not full API input_tokens (system prompt excluded from compression stats)

m2_gate_status.target: >=40% token savings on 2/3 of real Claude Code session outputs
m2_gate_status.current: 0% on synthetic baseline (expected — threshold not met)
m2_gate_status.next_step: Run real Claude Code session via ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8787 claude:code and re-run headroom perf
